Flexible single-target pull

  1. Pre-pull: Sacred Shield, Divine Plea, Holy Shield, and a planned potion.
  2. Pre-place Consecration only when the target will remain in it and the pull allows it.
  3. Use Hand of Reckoning as the target becomes attackable when snap damage matters.
  4. Use Avenging Wrath only when its 30-second lockout on major protection spells is safe.
  5. Hold Avenger's Shield for a caster, add, silence, or pickup when the encounter needs it.
  6. Enter 969 and keep the boss faced away from the group.
